text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I could have sworn I heard someone call
my name...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It must have been my imagination. But the bigger
issue at stake here is that I've gone off schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And this... This must be the Three Goddesses
statue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No matter what country I'm in, it always looks
beautiful.
